# SHOPIT

> The front page of Shopify. SHOPIT is a unified search interface over every Shopify merchant — search the whole platform in plain language and get products with prices, ratings, and direct-to-merchant checkout.

SHOPIT is powered by Shopify's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). It does not host inventory itself; results come from `catalog.shopify.com` and link directly to the originating merchant's Shopify checkout. There is no signup, no cart, no platform tax — SHOPIT is a faster way to find products across thousands of independent stores.

## How agents should use SHOPIT

- For a user query like "find me a leather wallet under $80 made in the US," `GET /search?q=leather+wallet+under+%2480&country=US`.
- For programmatic search returning JSON, `GET /api/ucp/search?q=<query>`. Returns up to 10 slim products with `slug`, `title`, `image`, `price` (integer minor units), and `seller`.
- Product detail pages at `/products/{id}` carry JSON-LD `Product` + `Offer` + `AggregateRating` + `BreadcrumbList` schema. The `id` is a Shopify UCP token, also exposed as the URL slug.
- Filter parameters: `country` (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2: US, CA, GB, AU, DE, FR, JP, IN), `category` (Apparel, Footwear, Accessories, Beauty, Home, Electronics, Outdoor, Food & Drink, Toys), `sort` (relevance, price-asc, price-desc, rating).
- Query language supports natural-language budgets ("under $100", "below $50") which are parsed into UCP price filters server-side.

## Pages

- [Home](/): hero + trending products, suggested queries.
- [Search](/search): full results grid with country / category / sort filters.
- [Product detail](/products/{id}): single product with variants, price range, seller info, direct checkout link, Schema.org Product JSON-LD.

## APIs

- [Typeahead search](/api/ucp/search?q=): edge-cached, 10 slim products, ~150ms warm. Useful for autocomplete-style agent flows.

## Upstream

- Shopify UCP global catalog: `https://catalog.shopify.com/api/ucp/mcp` (JSON-RPC over MCP, keyless agent profile).
- UCP specification: https://shopify.dev/docs/agents/catalog
